progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.alt.developer_comment: Alt text for icon that accompanies text explaining a course grade that contains an unreviewed exam attempt
progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.alt.string: Information icon for unreviewed course grade

progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.label.developer_comment: Label text which precedes the course grade when it contains an unreviewed exam review
progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.label.string: Your current course grade includes proctored exams that are awaiting review. Your grade will be updated after the reviews are completed.

progress.unreviewedExamScore.alt.developer_comment: Alt text for icon that triggers tooltip explaining a score that contains an unreviewed exam attempt
progress.unreviewedExamScore.alt.string: Information icon indicating pending exam review

progress.unreviewedExamScore.infoText.developer_comment: Label text which precedes a score for a subsection or assignment type that contains an unreviewed exam review
progress.unreviewedExamScore.infoText.string: Your proctored exam is currently awaiting review. Your final score is pending and may change after review.
